meta.title: Portfolio - Full Stack Engineer & QA Specialist
meta.description: Building scalable enterprise solutions. Specialized in Full Stack Development, QA Automation, and Software Architecture.

header.title: Full Stack Engineer & QA Specialist
header.description: Building scalable enterprise solutions with performance-driven development. Mobile, Backend, Frontend & Automation.

biography.title: My Journey
biography.para1: I am a Full Stack Developer and QA Engineer focused on building scalable enterprise solutions and automation tools.
biography.para2: Currently working as a Quality Analyst at NTT DATA and studying Information Systems. I have experience in mobile development, API architecture, automated testing and data analysis, always aiming to improve system performance and operational efficiency.
biography.para3: My goal is to grow as a Senior Software Engineer, focusing on enterprise architecture and intelligent process automation.

experience.title: Technologies & Tools
experience.subtitle: Technical skills and technologies I work with regularly.

qa.title: Quality Engineering & Automation
qa.subtitle: Expertise in quality assurance and automated testing
skills: Automated Web, Mobile and API testing

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Explore some of the projects I've developed using the latest web development technologies

projects.title: ALG Gestão
projects.description: Android application developed to optimize contract and equipment management for ALG Equipamentos company. The solution centralized operational data, increased contract traceability and significantly reduced registration time through optimized workflow. MVVM architecture with MySQL persistence.
projects.businessImpact: Reduction of manual processes | Improved traceability | Operational optimization

projects.title: PokéApp
projects.description: Professional cross-platform mobile application developed as a technical challenge response. Integration with PokéAPI demonstrating expertise in REST API consumption, data handling and responsive UX. Built with Ionic 8 + Angular 19 with automated testing and modern development patterns.
projects.businessImpact: Demonstrates scalable architecture | API integration | Production quality

projects.title: ERP Anduril 1.0
projects.description: Local desktop system for complete management of clients, contracts, land and bank slips with CNAB 240 integration. Developed with NestJS, TypeScript and SQLite, the project demonstrates advanced skills in software architecture, financial systems integration and performance-oriented development.
projects.businessImpact: Robust local solution | CNAB financial integration | Efficient data management

projects.title: Psychology Website
projects.description: Institutional website for psychology clinic with critical features: automated online scheduling and complete administrative panel. The platform digitized the scheduling process, reducing administrative overhead and improving patient experience.
projects.businessImpact: Appointment automation | Reduced administrative overhead | Professional digital presence

projects.title: TMDB to CSV
projects.description: Data extraction and processing pipeline from TMDB (The Movie Database). External API integration for data capture, transformation and CSV persistence. Project demonstrates expertise in data analysis, ETL and processing pipelines.
projects.businessImpact: Automated data pipeline | Structured data insights | Facilitated analysis

projects.title: ALG Budget
projects.description: Web platform complementary to ALG Gestão that automates equipment budget generation and sending. Significant reduction in operational time through intelligent forms and email system integration. Intuitive interface developed with React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
projects.businessImpact: Budget automation | Reduced operational time | Integration with ALG Gestão
